Wisconsin Challenge Series

Viewing Series Seasons
 View Also: Seasons - Drivers - All-Time W - T5 - T10 - Track Lists - Misc. Info on Right


Series Overview
Alternatively Known As: {{{FormerlyKnown}}}
Series Founded: 2001 Series active!
Car Style: Late Model Region: Wisconsin
Quick Stats
Most Wins: Nathan Haseleu (10) Most Titles:
Nathan Haseleu & Mark Eswein (3)
Number of Races: 81 Number of Drivers: 376
Project Status: Complete
The series was dormant between 2010 and 2016.
Season Races Champion Margin Most Wins
2001 3 Mark Eswein +4 Kirby Kurth (2)
2002 7 Gary Back +7 Seven Drivers (1)
2003 10 Erik Darnell +96 Erik Darnell (3)
2004 8 Mark Eswein +79 Adam Royle & Charlie Menard (2)
2005 9 Nathan Haseleu +180 Nathan Haseleu (3)
2006 11 Nathan Haseleu +38 Nathan Haseleu (4)
2007 11 Nathan Haseleu +39 Nathan Haseleu (2)
2008 6 Steve Holzhausen +23 No repeat winners
2009 5 Mark Eswein +41 No repeat winners
2017 4 Chris Weinkauf +24 Chris Weinkauf (2)
2018 4 Ryan Farrell +19 No repeat winners
2019 3 John Beale +13 John Beale (2)
